古仔回家打救4bar9 la diu

Honestly, I don't think Valverde wanted to win this match and he was always going to take a draw as a good result. Starting Alba that was injured for ages was the tell, Anoeta was a warm-up for El Clásico, and it's something that I disagree. Do your best every match.

Ter Stegen was forced to bypass the entire buildup play by kicking the ball to the final third for half the match. He’s excellent with his passes but the lack of options was despairing. Things picked off in the second half, but it wasn't enough because as soon as the opponent equalized the players looked defeated.

Barcelona's main problem is the same as ever. Matches away from home this season and the team is outclassed in intensity and pressing! It's not tactical, but an actual psychological or motivational problem.

The penalty was dodgy and VAR ignoring the penalty on Piqué was even worse, but it’s not like one can ever expect the officiating to be fair in Spain when Real Madrid is still contending for the league halfway through the season.

This was the hardest away match since Anfield and we didn't see enough confidence to be optimistic... Players need to show more heart and commitment in adversity or another debacle in the Champions League awaits.

Alena deserves to start in a game like this, if he had slept on pitch for the 70 minutes Rakitic played he would have done a better job. Arthur is out until next year, he's been throwing his career away with silly decisions like going snowboarding when injured. He has to get his shit together, he's a starter for Barcelona! Come on.

Pique had his best match in months, impeccable, and should've scored if not for one incredible goal-line clearance. Griezmann has completely arrived at Barcelona, fine performance even if he continues to be partially wasted on the left.

If Messi was selfish he would have at least another hundred goals to his name, but he isn’t and that’s what makes him Messi. To be honest, he had an irregular match and his weakest in months, not that we should worry.

One point gained? Real Sociedad didn't show enough to deserve a win, nor did Barcelona. Odegaard yet to justify this hype, played decently but we have seen many players with his skillset ending in nothing.

I'm expecting a win vs Real Madrid on Wednesday. Players show up on this fixture, no brainer.

【Now Sports-體育】巴塞隆拿周三聯賽主場與皇家馬德里打成0:0，是雙方2002年以來首次互交白卷，施丹顯然對未能獲勝感失望。

西班牙國家打吡周三在魯營球場舉行，結果巴塞隆拿主場與皇家馬德里互交白卷，這是雙方2002年11月以來首次沒有入球，歷時6235日。比較雙方表現，客隊皇家馬德里形勢佔優，不但有兩個12碼沒有判，加利夫巴爾更有一個入波被判越位，全場射門10次，其中4次中目標，反觀巴塞隆拿僅4射1中。

皇家馬德里教練施丹（Zinedine Zidane）賽後說：「戰果不夠好。我們壓在對方半場打，我對此感到滿意，希望能繼續這樣的打法，我們一開賽到完場都表現出色，但必須把握入球機會。」

該法國名帥亦成為歷來首位5訪魯營征巴塞俱保不敗的皇馬主帥，戰績為2勝3和。

巴塞隆拿球迷則在社交網站高呼炒掉教練華維迪，對他的戰術感到不滿，尤其中場棄用巴斯基斯，該教練賽後解畫何以不派巴斯基斯出場：「他賽前發燒，本來打算下半場派他上陣，但最後打消此念頭。」

【Now Sports-體育】西甲國家打吡在周三上演，盛傳巴塞隆拿中場維達爾得知未能出任正選後，於操練時大發雷霆。

ESPN報道，維達爾（Arturo Vidal）周二如常地在操練後留在訓練場，跟數名一隊隊友加操射門。不過，當教練華維迪告知未能於主場迎戰皇家馬德里這場國家打吡中擔正，他立即火上心頭。

在場其他球員立即安撫怒火中燒的維達爾，結果雖然這名32歲智利國腳其後冷靜下來，但仍然提走離開。據知雖然他今季僅為巴塞正選披甲5次，但一直認為在這場重要戰役將擔正。

合約在2021年才完結的維達爾早前已表示，因為正選機會不多，有意在1月離隊；今次事件過後，相信出走成數變得更高。盛傳國際米蘭已虎視眈眈，準備再次出手。
